source.title: PETKIT PuraMax 2 landing page data foundation
source.scope: PETKIT internal automatic self-cleaning cat litter box comparison

litterBoxFamily.heading: The self-cleaning litter box family
litterBoxFamily.body: Three PETKIT litter boxes in one category. Pick the size, format, and smart features that fit your home.

products.name: Pura Max 2
products.description: Balanced enclosed self-cleaning litter care with a 200 mm low entry, app visibility, 35 dB operation, and 11 safety sensors.

image.alt: Pura Max 2 self-cleaning cat litter box with cat

products.fit: Best fit for owners who want the main automatic litter routine without a camera premium.

products.name: Purobot Max Pro 2
products.description: Camera-assisted litter care for richer multi-cat identity and video-based monitoring needs.

image.alt: Purobot Max Pro 2 automatic litter box

products.fit: Best fit when camera visibility and multi-cat identity matter more than the lower entry of Pura Max 2.

products.name: Purobot Crystal Duo
products.description: Open-top format with the lowest entry in this comparison and a proprietary crystal tray system.

image.alt: Purobot Crystal Duo automatic litter box

products.fit: Best fit for low-entry access or a disposable tray routine, with the crystal tray constraint clearly stated.

ecosystem.heading: Complete the Smart Cat Care ecosystem
ecosystem.body: Pair self-cleaning litter care with smart feeding and fresh water in one connected PETKIT routine.

products.name: YumShare Solo
products.description: Smart feeding support with scheduled meals and camera-assisted check-ins.
products.fit: Use as the feeding add-on after the litter routine is introduced.

products.name: Eversweet Max 2
products.description: Cordless filtered water support with app monitoring, 3L capacity, and quieter daily hydration.
products.fit: Use as the cordless hydration add-on in the broader PETKIT care loop.

useCaseComparison.heading: Choose by household need
useCaseComparison.body: Pura Max 2 stays as the main product. The other PETKIT models clarify the upgrade or alternative path inside the PETKIT litter box lineup.
rows: 76L interior, 7L waste bin, low 200 mm entry, quiet 35 dB operation, and no camera premium.
AI camera and recognition features support homes that need more identity and event visibility.
Lowest entry and disposable tray routine
Open-top design, 180 mm entry, and crystal tray routine fit a different maintenance preference.
useCaseComparison.note: Hands-free duration, warranty, and pricing depend on market, purchase date, number of cats, usage frequency, and environment.

safe: Official physical specs and model codes.
Hands-free claims when paired with the one-cat caveat.
US warranty when stated as market-specific and date-specific.
Odor-control mechanisms without promising zero odor.
App usage and weight tracking without medical diagnosis wording.
needsCaveat: Max Pro 2 exact entrance height and recognition capacity.
Crystal Duo health or pH-related features.
Odor percentage claims unless tied to PETKIT lab wording.
Pricing, because it changes by market and date.
doNotUse: Unverified superlatives such as best in market or safest.
Odor-free, 100% safe, or absolute leak-proof claims.
Medical diagnosis, prevention, or treatment claims.
Statements that Pura Max 2 has AI camera features.
Statements that Pura Max 2 works with all litter types.
